events-delete-policy.name: events-delete-policy
events-delete-policy.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM admin_permissions
        WHERE admin_id = (select auth.uid())
        AND admin_role IN ('super_admin', 'content_admin')
        AND is_active = true
      )

bot-message-room-members insert.name: bot-message-room-members insert
bot-message-room-members insert.withCheck:
"bot_message_room_members"."profile_id" = (select auth.uid()) AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "bot_message_rooms"
        WHERE "bot_message_rooms"."bot_message_room_id" = "bot_message_room_members"."bot_message_room_id"
        AND "bot_message_rooms"."created_by" = (select auth.uid())
      )

posts-insert-policy.name: posts-insert-policy
posts-insert-policy.withCheck:
(select auth.uid()) = "posts"."profile_id"
        AND (
          NOT "posts"."is_notice" OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM admin_permissions
            WHERE admin_id = (select auth.uid())
            AND admin_role IN ('super_admin', 'content_admin')
            AND is_active = true
          )
        )

posts-update-policy.name: posts-update-policy
posts-update-policy.withCheck:
(
          NOT "posts"."is_notice" OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM admin_permissions
            WHERE admin_id = (select auth.uid())
            AND admin_role IN ('super_admin', 'content_admin')
            AND is_active = true
          )
        )

posts-delete-policy.name: posts-delete-policy
posts-delete-policy.using:
((select auth.uid()) = "posts"."profile_id" AND NOT "posts"."is_notice")
        OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM admin_permissions
          WHERE admin_id = (select auth.uid())
          AND admin_role IN ('super_admin', 'content_admin')
          AND is_active = true
        )

evidence_sources_pmid_or_doi_check.value: ("pmid" IS NOT NULL) OR ("doi" IS NOT NULL)

routine-items-select.name: routine-items-select

        WHERE routine_templates.id = "routine_items"."template_id"
        AND routine_templates.user_id = (select auth.uid())
      )
